creator: freebsd@ny-central.org
text:
Created attachment 254013
patch for deskutils/ganttproject

Can confirm - it's working without SUID. Removed SUID option from pkg-plist. See attached patch to fix and remove this.

portlint and portclippy both confirmed happy - after an additional fix to replace /bin/sh with ${SH}.

PORTREVISION upgraded.
